title: Ancient Debris Tweak(NEED JSON THINGS)
description:
Need Json Things（not on modrinth)！
A minecraft mod that tweaked the Ancient Debris a little
Ancient Debris->Nether Ancient Debris Ore, drop Raw Ancient Debris while mining.
body:
This minecraft mod([Github](https://github.com/QikaHome/Ancient-Debris-Tweak)) tweaked the Ancient Debris a little, and reduce the difficulty of getting many of it a little.
Now the Ancient Debris are Nether Ancient Debris Ore, and it drops Raw Ancient Debris now.
Need Json Things ([Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-things))([Github](https://github.com/gigaherz/JsonThings))
Now work on Forge 1.18.2~1.20.1,Neoforge 1.20.1,1.20.4;
May work below 1.18.2,but rename it from .jar to .zip and put it in .minecraft/thingpacks/ or .minecraft/versions/{you version}/thingpacks .
See it on [mcmod.cn](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/14231.html)
